nodes.label: The cross-cutting principle: purity decides boundaries
nodes.norm_label: the cross-cutting principle: purity decides boundaries

nodes.label: defineBuiltin DSL
nodes.rationale: DSL for declaring built-in chips declaratively inside registerBuiltinDefs(); abstracts away low-level wire/component manipulation

nodes.label: SR Latch
nodes.rationale: Two cross-coupled NOR gates; g2 listed before g1 so cold-start relaxation settles to Q=0

nodes.label: D Flip-Flop
nodes.rationale: Master-slave architecture using two D Latches; rising-edge triggered

nodes.label: 4-bit Ripple Counter
nodes.rationale: T Flip-Flops chained by Q' output so each stage clocks from previous stage's falling edge

nodes.label: VM Test Runner Pattern
nodes.rationale: Uses Node.js vm.createContext to load model.js/builtins.js/engine.js headlessly; render.js/ui.js/interact.js excluded because they require DOM

nodes.label: Canvas Setup (initCanvas / RAF loop)
nodes.rationale: Dirty-flag driven RAF loop (not continuous); DPR scaling applied separately for screen-space vs world-space drawing

nodes.label: uiHits Array
nodes.rationale: Populated during render(), iterated back-to-front for z-order correct hit testing; rebuilt every frame so coordinates must not be stored across frames

nodes.label: Circuit Data Structure
nodes.rationale: components[], wires[], _maps (lazy cache); touchCircuit() invalidates cache after structural changes

nodes.label: passCircuit / settle
nodes.rationale: Gauss-Seidel relaxation up to 800 passes; CUSTOM evaluation is recursive into child circuit

nodes.label: History / Step-back
nodes.rationale: Deep-clones out[], state, extValue keyed by component id; walks full hierarchy via walkAllComps; capped at 500 snapshots

nodes.label: Boolean Expression Derivation
nodes.rationale: Recursive tree builder with visited set to prevent infinite loops through feedback; budget cap at 4000 nodes

nodes.label: Wire Routing Math (defaultWireRoute)
nodes.rationale: Forward: single midX; backward: 3-segment loop. wireRoutePoints alternates H/V segments via route array

nodes.label: Initialization Order (main.js)
nodes.rationale: registerBuiltinDefs → setTopCircuit → initCanvas → initInteractions → initUI → loadLocal/seedDemo → requestRender

nodes.label: Gauss-Seidel Simulation Model
nodes.rationale: Iterates all components until no value changes; feedback loops (latches) hold state between passes so relaxation can settle them; circuits that never settle are flagged Sim.unstable

nodes.label: CUSTOM Component Type
nodes.rationale: Carries its own live circuit instance deep-cloned on instantiation; evaluation is recursive through the hierarchy

nodes.label: Circuit Maps Lazy Cache (_maps)
nodes.rationale: Lazy cache of {byId, inWire}; touchCircuit(circ) must be called to invalidate after any components or wires mutation

nodes.label: Split Inspector Pane
nodes.rationale: Second read-only canvas (#canvas2) for inspecting chip internals live alongside the parent; _secondary flag routes activeView/activeCircuit during rendering and hit-testing

nodes.label: Three-Valued Logic (true / false / null Hi-Z)
nodes.rationale: null = high-impedance. busValue() resolves buses: single active driver wins; all Hi-Z → null; conflicting drivers → short circuit flagged via detectShortsIn()

nodes.label: Pure Module Architecture (no DOM)
nodes.rationale: model.js, engine.js, builtins.js contain no DOM references so they can be loaded in Node.js via vm for headless testing; render.js, ui.js, interact.js require a DOM

nodes.label: afterSimChange() Post-Simulation Hook
nodes.rationale: Must be called after any simulation state change; triggers requestRender, updateSimUI, refreshLivePanels, refreshExprPopup, renderTimeline
